en_title: Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 Listings Have Fans Fearing Pricey PlayStation Ports
cn_title: 《PlayStation》《使命召唤：黑色行动》移植版标价40美元(约合人民币271元)(约271元)引不满
subtitle: 粉丝炸了
opus_summary: 微软商店将《使命召唤：黑色行动1/2》标价40美元(约合人民币271元)(约271元)且不含DLC，PS玩家担心移植版同样高价。玩家社群强烈不满，认为十余年老游戏应更便宜。动视尚未确认PS定价，此事引发广泛争议。

paragraphs.en: PlayStation fans are fearing the worst after Microsoft set the price of Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 at $40 without DLC.
paragraphs.cn: 在微软将《使命召唤：黑色行动1》和《黑色行动2》定价为40美元(约合人民币271元)且不含DLC后，PlayStation玩家开始担心最坏的情况。

paragraphs.en: As reported by CharlieIntel , PC and Xbox marketplaces were recently updated with new DLC prices, while locking in the 2010 and 2012 Call of Duty games at $39.99 each. Black Ops 1 and 2 have been available on Xbox consoles for some time thanks to extensive backward compatibility support on Microsoft's consoles, with the real changes arriving in individual DLCs that now seem to be $10 instead of $15, and season passes now priced at $30 instead of $50.
paragraphs.cn: 据CharlieIntel报道，PC和Xbox商城最近更新了DLC价格，同时将这两款2010年和2012年的《使命召唤》游戏锁定在每款39.99美元(约合人民币271元)。得益于微软主机广泛提供向后兼容支持，《黑色行动1》和《黑色行动2》在Xbox上已经可以游玩多时，真正的变化在于单个DLC——现在似乎从15美元(约合人民币102元)降到了10美元(约合人民币68元)，而季票价格也从50美元(约合人民币339元)降到了30美元(约合人民币203元)。

paragraphs.en: It's an update that follows news that Activision would launch ports – not remasters – for the two classic Treyarch games for PS4 and PS5 in July. However, without prices for the new releases officially announced, PlayStation fans are worried the Xbox listings suggest they'll soon need to fork over a hefty amount of cash for games that are more than a decade old.
paragraphs.cn: 在此之前，动视已公布将于七月为PS4和PS5推出Treyarch这两款经典游戏的移植版——而非重制版。然而，由于官方尚未公布新版本的价格，PlayStation玩家担心Xbox商城上的标价意味着他们很快就要为这些超过十年的老游戏掏出一大笔钱。

paragraphs.en: "Not including the DLC and charging $40 on games from Obama’s first term is nasty work," one X/Twitter user reacted .
paragraphs.cn: 「不含DLC还要对奥巴马第一任期时的游戏收40美元(约合人民币271元)，这吃相也太难看了。」一名X/Twitter用户这样回应。

paragraphs.en: "Games this old should be 20 bucks max WITH the DLC," another popular post suggested .
paragraphs.cn: 「这么老的游戏，就算带上DLC最多也只该卖20美元(约合人民币136元)。」另一条热门帖子认为。

paragraphs.en: Activision revealed its port plans last week, only promising it would include Campaign, Multiplayer, and Zombie modes when they launched. There's been no mention of how DLC will be handled, and the emphasis on the word "port" suggests little to no changes when it comes to the base experiences that released in the early 2010s.
paragraphs.cn: 动视上周公布了移植计划，只承诺发售时会包含战役、多人游戏和僵尸模式。DLC的处理方式只字未提，而强调「移植」一词意味着，这些2010年代初发售的游戏的核心体验基本不会有任何变化。

paragraphs.en: Should the prices shown on the Microsoft Store carry over to the PlayStation ports, players who want both games might need to shell out $80. Add in the cost of both season passes and you're looking at a total cost of $140 for the full package. Again, without confirmation from Activision, it's hard to tell just how much any of this will cost or what will be included, but that same lack of clarification is exactly what has fans so worked up.
paragraphs.cn: 如果微软商城上的价格延续到PlayStation移植版上，那么想同时入手两款游戏的玩家可能就得掏出80美元(约合人民币542元)。再把两张季票的费用算上，整套下来总共要花140美元(约合人民币949元)。同样，由于动视尚未确认，很难说最终的售价和内容会如何，但正是这种信息的缺失让粉丝们如此激动。

paragraphs.en: "Wait what the f**k that's insane lmao," one Reddit user . "That's worth like $20-30 max with all DLCs included. For a remake/remaster with the DLCs I would've said $40, maybe $50 at the very high end."
paragraphs.cn: 「等等，这什么鬼，太离谱了吧哈哈。」一位Reddit用户说道，「这顶多值个二三十美元(约合人民币136-203元)，还得带上全部DLC。要是重制版或者复刻版含DLC，我或许还会说40美元(约合人民币271元)，撑死50美元(约合人民币339元)。」

paragraphs.en: "The numbers Mason, they're telling you not to buy..." someone else .
paragraphs.cn: 「梅森，这些数字在告诉你：别买……」另一位用户玩梗道。

paragraphs.en: "$40 for games we already purchased (allegedly with no enhancements btw) is an absolute atrocity," someone else said .
paragraphs.cn: 「花40美元(约合人民币271元)买我们早就买过的游戏（而且据说还没有任何增强），简直是一种暴行。」另有人表示。

paragraphs.en: IGN gave the original Call of Duty: Black Ops an 8.5/10 review when it launched in November 2010, and its sequel a 9.3/10 review when it launched in November 2012. They've spent the years since as two of the most celebrated and quotable titles in Call of Duty history, making next month's ports two highly anticipated titles as players wait for this year's Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 . For now, the ports have no firm release date outside of the promise to see them launch next month.
paragraphs.cn: IGN当年为2010年11月发售的原版《使命召唤：黑色行动》给出了8.5分的评测，其后在2012年11月发售的续作也拿下了9.3分。多年来，这两部作品已成为《使命召唤》系列历史上最受赞誉、最常被引用的作品，也让下个月即将到来的移植版备受期待——尤其玩家还在等待今年的《使命召唤：现代战争4》。目前，除了承诺下个月发售之外，这两款移植版尚无确切的发售日期。
